From: LlamaIndex <news@llamaindex.ai>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 03 Jun 2025 13:30:00 +0000
Subject: LlamaIndex Newsletter 2025-06-03
Message-ID: <eMQSYAiSQN64ujAfqgYy6A@geopod-ismtpd-23>
Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="d270a1f9d863294109b00663af0004611f88f27167834325d30cf00926d7"

Hi there, Lofty Llama Luminaries! 🦙

Welcome to this week's edition of the LlamaIndex newsletter! We
have some exciting updates, including on the future of RAG, our
sponsorship of the upcoming Gradio Agents & MCP Hackathon, and
new features in LlamaCloud. Dive in to explore these highlights
and more!

🤩 The Highlights:

* RAG is Dead, Long Live Agentic Retrieval!
Discover how we've evolved from naive RAG systems to fully
agentic strategies in LlamaCloud. This blog post explains how to
intelligently query multiple knowledge bases with just a few
lines of code. Read more ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..mt8KvHDZ0tipZFfNUI0Ixfb_uWoilzRsAVXIl8ybYUs ).

* New OpenAI Responses API Features:
LlamaIndex now supports exciting new features from OpenAI,
including remote MCP server calls, code interpreters, and image
generation with streaming. Learn more ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..2XGFTk3qBsHISEWa7ujDDLhcjV1TJnDJhUaQwL6LJNg ) .

* Gradio Agents & MCP Hackathon:
We're proud to sponsor the largest MCP and AI agent development
event of 2025! Join us from June 2-8, 2025, for a chance to win
over $400K in API credits and cash prizes. Register now 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Mp2Z6sV0VPpJNgOZ0uiNNyVDjAPSO2yqKT-Et_w0P0Y ).

☁️ LlamaCloud & LlamaParse:

* Enhanced Structured Output Support:
LlamaIndex now supports new structured output types from OpenAI,
including arrays, enums, and string constraint fields. Check it
out ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..vBKPpGEA6zjrkaHbi3NShWo7fybxcKuOVE6IycT3zHE ).

* LlamaParse with Sonnet 4.0:
Utilize the latest LLMs for parsing complex documents with
LlamaParse, now supporting Sonnet 4.0 in agent and LVM
modes. Sign up here ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..ArOEp_Y9o99iSelOQFejjf5-EUArIHe5XkYemMVPLkQ ).

🏗️ Framework:

* Custom Multimodal Embedder Guide:
Learn how to create a custom embedder for LlamaIndex that
supports AWS Titan Multimodal, integrating text and image
queries. Explore the guide ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..L-LNAkWQYo27zrI5E_qaudUM0Ha-RKr13wj20u97J8Q ).

* Image Generation Agent:
Check out our open-source project that automates the image
generation process using OpenAI's API and Google Gemini's
capabilities. Get started ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RAlm7bo144cR4vJHzGOi8Lj_r2HanvTlmXCFB7V7qPI ).

🌐 Community:

* Join Us at the AI Engineer World Fair:
Meet our team in San Francisco from June 3-5, where @jerryjliu0
will speak on building AI agents that automate knowledge
work. Book a meeting ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..577UIbd7ZObn97cB75z_Hp_O3K_T7iyKLtk8GcfI2CI ).

* 12 Factor Agents:
We released an interactive guide highlighting the principles for
building effective AI agents. Check it out 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..A5fnsBNlzb43ieahS5TkRGW6AY_Gt5KqHY14ihEOhPc ).

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community! We’re
excited to see what you create with our tools and resources. Stay
tuned for more updates, and don’t forget to follow us on Twitter
for the latest news!

Best,
The LlamaIndex Team

* Calling all enterprises: are you building with LlamaIndex? We
are working hard to make LlamaIndex even more Enterprise-ready
and have sneak peeks at our upcoming products available for
partners. Interested? Get in touch. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..aOvi8S106UFeFUxcgZ4_qiHRFa_Yvn3u6WrTvqDqv00 )

* Join our Discord ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..11QPBxM_fXBCLiaD7DloK7i5g31Uh6f6RV7q4k3FTwM )
community for live discussions and support.

* Check out our GitHub ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.._DJyk80agZ478U7GBzI7bBl8HVOwsXn1ea5k1zbaZPI )  for the latest code releases and documentation.

Thank you for being a part of the LlamaIndex community. We're
here to help you unleash the power of LLMs over your data!

Best regards,
The LlamaIndex Team
